Using Proxy in Vite to Fix CORS Issues
Frontend devs hit CORS constantly. Walkthrough of Vite's built-in proxy — string form, options form, and how to route dev requests through to dodge CORS.

A list of public APIs I've collected for frontend practice projects. Hunting for an API to wire up a small side project takes way longer than it should, so this is a personal cheat sheet — news, audio/video, social, images, lifestyle, and source control. I haven't personally tried all of these; some require auth/OAuth and some have CORS issues, so test before committing.
Hit a CORS Wall and Can't Touch the Backend? Wrap It With Google Apps Script

Calling an API from the frontend and getting slapped with a CORS error, but you can't change the backend? This post starts from the idea of the Same-origin policy, then uses Google Apps Script to wrap a little proxy around a third-party API. That turns it into your own same-origin API and gets you past the CORS restriction.
